summary: Backend testing of Team League, Rewards CRUD, Redemptions, Profile Completion, and Exports (CSV/PDF). 18/19 tests passed, 1 skipped (attendance export - no season seeded).

minor.issue: Returns 400 when no season exists. Not tested against a real season since none was available in the DB.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2218 lines - consider splitting into feature modules (rewards, exports, team_league, profile) for maintainability.
attendance_bonus_xp is computed in team-league response but NOT auto-awarded to users - confirm this is intentional (currently informational only).
In redeem_reward, XP deduction, xp_events insert, stock decrement, and redemption insert are not in a transaction - partial failures could desync state.

ProfileUpdate does not include team_id; new users can only reach 100% completion if a team is assigned via a separate admin flow. Verified xp is awarded once (idempotent) via profile_completed_awarded flag.

success_rate.backend: 100% (18/18 executed, 1 skipped due to no season)

test_credentials: admin@spartans.com/Spartan123!, leader@spartans.com/Leader123!, member@spartans.com/Member123!, achilles@spartans.com/Demo123! (3200 XP for redemption test)
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral TEST_-prefixed rewards during tests; all deleted in teardown. One redemption row remains for achilles@spartans.com (100 XP deducted, then fulfilled).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_league_rewards_exports.py covers all new endpoints. Attendance export test is skipped when no season exists - create a season to fully cover it. achilles@spartans.com XP was reduced by 100 during redemption test.
verified: GET /api/team-league returns correct shape with 6-tier attendance_xp_table
attendance_bonus_xp matches table for every team's monthly_attendance_pct
4 seeded rewards present with correct costs (300/500/1500/2000)
Redeem: XP deducted, xp_events logged, redemption pending, /auth/me reflects new XP
Redeem insufficient XP -> 400; stock=0 -> 400 'Out of stock'
PATCH /api/profile awards +50 XP once at 100% (idempotent on second call)
Exports: CSV headers exact match for team-performance, daily; PDF starts with %PDF-
Exports require super_admin/team_leader (member gets 403); team_leader can access team-performance
